Lastly, the ASR Tactical knife throwing set comes with a perfectly fitted handy nylon knife sheath with Velcro closure, to keep knives secure and in place when not in use; the knife sheath also features a back tunnel loop for belt loop or other on or off person carrying options depending on the carriers preference. title: ASR Federal Counterfeit Bill Detector Pen US and International Currency Marker
short_description: Are you looking to detect counterfeit currency without bearing the cost of expensive gadgets? Then the ASR Federal Counterfeit Banknote Detection Pen is the perfect tool for you. This detector pen is filled with an iodine-based ink designed to be applied to banknotes in an attempt to determine authenticity. Most genuine banknotes are printed on paper made with cotton fibers and do not contain the starches that are reactive with iodine, so when the pen is used to mark genuine bills the mark will be yellowish or colorless. Counterfeit bills, however, are typically printed on photocopier paper or standard printer paper, so the ink from this pen will change to black if the bill is counterfeit.
narrative: Are you looking to detect counterfeit currency without bearing the cost of expensive gadgets? Then the ASR Federal Counterfeit Banknote Detection Pen is the perfect tool for you. This detector pen is filled with an iodine-based ink designed to be applied to banknotes in an attempt to determine authenticity. Most genuine banknotes are printed on paper made with cotton fibers and do not contain the starches that are reactive with iodine, so when the pen is used to mark genuine bills the mark will be yellowish or colorless. Counterfeit bills, however, are typically printed on photocopier paper or standard printer paper, so the ink from this pen will change to black if the bill is counterfeit. If the bill you test has a yellow/colorless mark, it is real. If the mark is black, it is fake. Our counterfeit currency detector pen will provide results within seconds, and the mark will fade completely within a few hours. The ink will work on the following international paper currencies: Argentia - Peso Brazil - Cruzero Britain - Pound Euro Countries - Euro Hong Kong - Dollar Japan - Yen Korea - Won Macao - Dollar Malaysia - Dollar New Zealand - Dollar Russia - Ruble South Africa - Rand Taiwan - NT Dollar Thailand - Baht USA - Dollar Counterfeiting is estimated to cost US businesses $200 billion annually, so having an active way to check for counterfeit currency at the point of sale is any business owner's best protection. With the ASR Federal Counterfeit Banknote Detection Pen, you can protect your business from counterfeiters without shelling out for expensive anti-counterfeiting systems. This pen is also a great option for entrepreneurs, bank tellers, and law enforcement officers. Make sure to grab one of these for yourself, or buy a set to supply to your employees and protect your business from counterfeiters!

narrative: Safely test the karat content of gold with ToolTreaux’s 14k Gold Testing Safety Kit! The kit includes x1 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottle, x1 pair of safety glasses, x2 plastic pipettes, x2 glass vials and x1 testing stone; the 14k gold testing solution will see you through hundreds of tests! A must-have tool for gold panning, coin, antiques and jewelry appraisal, or other professions that work with gold and precious metals. 14k GOLD TESTING KIT METHOD: This gold testing method is ideally used on gold that is yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished gold items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise the finish of the item HOW THE GOLD TESTING KIT WORKS: To test gold karat content, scratch the item onto the test stone leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if the gold is the same karat or higher the solution will not affect the deposit; if the deposit is of a lower karat, the deposit will dissolve and eventually disappear; ensure gold testing stone has been thoroughly washed before completing any testing SAFETY NOTE: Testing Solutions can be harmful to the skin. Please exercise the utmost caution when opening and using this product and method of testing! Proper protective eye wear and gloves are highly recommended, as the solution can burn unprotected skin. Read the label on the bottle and follow the included operational instructions.

The resin dipped body adds extra durability and feel. Includes protective plastic snap sheath. This axe is great for cutting branches and chopping or splitting wood for campfires. The flattened butt can also be used as a hammer if necessary. Specifications: Blade Face: 3-1/2", Height: 11", Blade to Butt: 4-1/2".

title: ASR Outdoor Snapatite 4 in 1 Utensil Set Lightweight Pocket-sized Cutlery 4pc
short_description: Eat lunch or your favorite snacks on the go with the ASR Outdoor Snapatite 4 in 1 Utensil Set! When you're done eating, you can simply snap the knife and spoon piece back into the fork piece with the bottle opener.
narrative: Eat lunch or your favorite snacks on the go with the ASR Outdoor Snapatite 4 in 1 Utensil Set! This set comes with 4 complete utensil sets - each piece comes apart to reveal a spoon, fork, knife and bottle opener. When you're done eating, you can simply snap the knife and spoon piece back into the fork piece with the bottle opener. These utensils are constructed of durable BPA free plastic, and they are dishwasher safe. They're lightweight and pocket-sized, making them ideal for travel, camping, hiking, road trips and more. Make sure to keep one of these sets in your bag, backpack, car or camping gear for your next adventure!
